title: DebunkBot — chat with an AI that argues against conspiracy beliefs
summary: An interactive demo from the study showing personalised LLM dialogues meaningfully reduce belief in conspiracy theories. Try it for 15 minutes and notice what shifts.

title: How cognitive manipulation and AI will shape disinformation in 2026
summary: Accessible piece framing the landscape of AI-shaped disinformation — good starting context before diving into research.

title: Misinformation and the information ecosystem
summary: Open-access journal article on the dynamics of misinformation in modern information systems.

title: Misinformation, Disinformation, and Generative AI: Implications for Perception and Policy
summary: Survey-style paper connecting generative AI to perception effects and policy responses.
